chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-652 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case. 05-03-2024 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahid Hussan Jogi, Advocate for respondent No.4 a/w Dr. Rehan Ali Jogi, Chairman, Town Committee, Mirwah. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Chairman, Town Committee, Mirwah has appeared in compliance of B.Ws. It is reported that entire pensionery benefits of petitioner have been cleared off except an amount of Rs. 3,93,000/- outstanding against Town Committee, Mirwah. Chairman, T.C, Mirwah is present and has submitted a cheque of Rs. 50,000/-, which is handed over to the petitioner against acknowledgment receipt. He further submits Rs. 60,000/- per month would be disbursed to him regularly and without any break until the entire amount is paid to him. Accordingly, this petition having served its purpose is disposed of. However, default in payment to the petitioner in the amount, as undertaken by the Chairman, T.C, Mirwah, would expose him to the contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
